song.title: Loving Jesus, That is All
song.lyrics: [v1] Simply loving every day; Loving through a stormy way, Even when my faith is small, Loving Jesus, that is all. [c] Loving as the moments fly, Loving as the days go by, Loving Him, whatever befall, Loving Jesus, that is all [v2] Brightly does His Spirit shine Into this poor heart of mine; While He leads I cannot fall, Loving Jesus, that is all. [v3] Singing if my way be clear, Praying if my path be drear; If in danger, on Him call, Loving Jesus, that is all. [v4] Loving Him while life shall last, Loving Him till earth is past, Till His gracious advent call, Loving Jesus, that is all.
